stemHtml: An airplane whose maximum approved passenger seating configuration is greater than 600 seats must be equipped with at least…

options.a: 6 hand fire extinguishers conveniently located in the passenger compartment.
options.b: 7 hand fire extinguishers conveniently located in the passenger compartment.
options.c: 9 hand fire extinguishers conveniently located in the passenger compartment.
options.d: 8 hand fire extinguishers conveniently located in the passenger compartment.
